# Training Repos

This skill's heuristics ‚Äî especially course detection, notebook handling, and multi-language support ‚Äî were trained and validated against these repos. Use them for regression testing when making changes to the skill.

## Course/Tutorial repos

- `github/copilot-cli-for-beginners` ‚Äî Copilot CLI course (markdown + Python)
- `microsoft/ai-agents-for-beginners` ‚Äî AI agents course (markdown + notebooks + Python/C#)
- `microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners` ‚Äî GenAI course (markdown + notebooks + Python/JS/TS)
- `microsoft/mcp-for-beginners` ‚Äî MCP tutorial (markdown + TS/Python/Java/C#)
- `microsoft/langchainjs-for-beginners` ‚Äî LangChain.js course (markdown + TypeScript)
- `microsoft/langchain-for-beginners` ‚Äî LangChain course (markdown + Python)
- `microsoft/langchain4j-for-beginners` ‚Äî LangChain4j course (markdown + Java)
- `microsoft/ML-For-Beginners` ‚Äî Machine Learning course (markdown + notebooks + Python)
- `microsoft/Web-Dev-For-Beginners` ‚Äî Web development course (markdown + JS/HTML/CSS)
- `microsoft/AI-For-Beginners` ‚Äî AI course (markdown + notebooks + Python)
- `microsoft/Data-Science-For-Beginners` ‚Äî Data science course (markdown + notebooks + Python)
- `microsoft/IoT-For-Beginners` ‚Äî IoT course (markdown + hardware samples)
- `microsoft/Generative-AI-for-beginners-dotnet` ‚Äî GenAI .NET course (markdown + C#)
- `microsoft/generative-ai-for-beginners-java` ‚Äî GenAI Java course (markdown + Java)
- `microsoft/AZD-for-beginners` ‚Äî Azure Developer CLI tutorial (markdown + CLI examples)
- `microsoft/edgeai-for-beginners` ‚Äî Edge AI course (markdown + sample apps)
- `microsoft/xr-development-for-beginners` ‚Äî XR/Unity course (markdown + Unity/C#)

## Application repos

- `johnpapa/vscode-peacock` ‚Äî VS Code functional extension (TypeScript, Mocha tests)
- `johnpapa/shopathome` ‚Äî Multi-framework shopping app (Angular 21, React 19, Svelte 5, Vue 3.5, Fastify 5, Azure Functions v4)
- `johnpapa/angular-styleguide` ‚Äî Documentation-only style guide (markdown)
- `johnpapa/heroes-angular` ‚Äî Standard Angular SPA with json-server backend, Cypress, proxy config
- `johnpapa/heroes-vue` ‚Äî Vue SPA with separate API package, not a monorepo
- `johnpapa/heroes-react` ‚Äî React SPA (CRA-era) with json-server, proxy, Docker, env files

## npm packages

- `johnpapa/lite-server` ‚Äî Small CLI package (JS, Mocha/Istanbul tests, bin/ entry point)

## Multi-app collections

- `johnpapa/hello-worlds` ‚Äî Angular/React/Svelte/Vue demos, independent apps, no workspace
- `johnpapa/http-interceptors` ‚Äî Same concept in Angular + Svelte, comparison monorepo

## VS Code extension variants

- `johnpapa/vscode-cloak` ‚Äî Functional extension (TypeScript, webpack, commands + settings)
- `johnpapa/vscode-winteriscoming` ‚Äî Theme extension (JSON theme files, no runtime code)
- `johnpapa/vscode-angular-snippets` ‚Äî Snippets extension (JSON snippets, language-scoped, devcontainer)

## Large open-source library monorepos

- `langchain-ai/langchain` ‚Äî Python multi-package monorepo (`libs/*`), pyproject.toml per package, AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md
- `langchain-ai/langchainjs` ‚Äî TypeScript monorepo (pnpm + Turborepo + Changesets), workspace packages under `libs/`
- `langchain4j/langchain4j` ‚Äî Java Maven aggregator with 30+ modules, JDK-conditional builds, Spotless formatting

## Real-world field tests

- `FritzAndFriends/BlazorWebFormsComponents` ‚Äî .NET multi-target library (Blazor, C#)
